summary: Analyst consensus $80.08B, range $78.16B-$81.29B. YoY growth accelerating from 12.3% to 18.4%. Seasonal Q1->Q2 pattern shows ~6.2% sequential growth.
content:
Microsoft Q2 FY2026 (Oct-Dec 2025) revenue forecast:
- Analyst consensus: $80.08B (low: $78.16B, high: $81.29B)
- Q2 FY2025 was $69.632B, so ~15% YoY growth hits consensus
- YoY growth has been accelerating: 12.3%, 13.3%, 18.1%, 18.4% over last 4 quarters
- Sequential Q1->Q2 seasonal pattern: +6.2% last year (would give $82.3B - above consensus)
- MSFT typically beats consensus by 1-2%
- Likely outcome: $80-82B range
